title: RankingHistoryEntry Collection
description: Array of RankingHistoryEntry records. Each element: Dated snapshot of all author rankings, enabling rank-over-time analysis.

RankingSnapshot.description: A single author's ranking at a point in time.

rank.description: Ranking position at this snapshot date (with ties).
rank.title: Rank

score.description: Combined score at this snapshot: artifact_score + citation_score + ae_score.
score.title: Score

as.description: Artifact score at this snapshot. Abbreviated 'as' in JSON output.
as.title: As

tp.description: Total papers at tracked conferences at this snapshot.
tp.title: Tp

ta.description: Total artifacts authored at this snapshot.
ta.title: Ta

rr.description: Reproducibility rate: percentage of artifacts with 'reproduced' badge.
rr.title: Rr

RankingSnapshot.title: RankingSnapshot

RankingHistoryEntry.description: Dated snapshot of all author rankings, enabling rank-over-time analysis.

entries.description: Author name (DBLP format) → ranking snapshot. Keys include disambiguation suffixes.
entries.title: Entries

RankingHistoryEntry.title: RankingHistoryEntry
